name: Black Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp chopped fresh cilantro, or 1 tsp dried cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely mash half the beans by hand.
2. Add the remaining whole beans and all of the other ingredients, blending well.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Garnish with cilantro or parsley.
Makes about 2 3/4 cups dip.
Suggested dippers: Bok choy, tortilla chips, corn bread croutons
